trending_videos.title: Dune: Part Three | Official Trailer
trending_videos.description:
“Forgive me for all I’ve done” Experience the epic conclusion. Dune: Part Three only in theaters and IMAX December 18. #DuneMovie#FilmedforIMAX

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes Dune: Part Three, bringing Academy Award-nominated filmmaker Denis Villeneuve’s epic trilogy to a breathtaking conclusion.

Dune: Part Three is set nearly two decades after Paul Atreides seized control of the Imperium. Now a ruthless Emperor, Paul must face the consequences of his reign as old allies return, terrifying new threats emerge, and betrayal lurks in every shadow. Haunted by visions of Imperial collapse and the reappearance of his long-lost love, Paul is drawn into a sweeping conspiracy, with Chani at the heart of its unfolding mystery. As rebellion brews and enemies close in, Paul must confront the true cost of power and the fate of those he loves the most.

The film stars Oscar nominee Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Jason Momoa, Oscar nominee Florence Pugh, Rebecca Ferguson, Isaa

trending_videos.title: GODZILLA MINUS ZERO | Official Teaser
trending_videos.description:
Returning to zero is not an option.

GODZILLA MINUS ZERO
VFX, Written, and Directed by Takashi Yamazaki

In theatres November 6
Follow @godzilla_toho and @GKIDSfilms for more updates!
godzillaminuszero.com

GODZILLA MINUS ZERO picks up in 1949, two years after the tumultuous events of Godzilla Minus One, and continues the story of the Shikishima family as they face an all-new calamity. 

As a project Filmed For IMAX, GODZILLA MINUS ZERO was shot with high-definition digital cameras certified by IMAX, and optimized in sound and imagery unique to IMAX screens. Fans can look forward to seeing Godzilla presented to all new terrifying heights, making GODZILLA MINUS ZERO a true cinematic event not to be missed.

trending_videos.title: Something Won't Let You Leave...
trending_videos.description:
Something Won't Let You Leave...

And it's something horrifying.

Verity's voice actor: ‪@JustWhispy  
Special thanks to @GroxMC for accepting to be in the vid!

Watch my videos on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/033vHZW7F2GVDiC44bHwfj

Shoutout to:
@itsfilsfr - Verity helpline voice actor
@peaktownmc - made the laboratory machine model
@9meoww - helped me with animations
@HeroHayden47 - helped Whispy with voicelines

This is part 3 of the Minecraft Verity Series:
I built a way out, and it let me believe it. Every wire led to an escape. Every calculation said it would work. And the second it mattered, I found out it only ever worked one way.

NO, you CANNOT publish mods, sell merch, or do anything commercial about Verity before asking me first.

NO,  you CANNOT repost dubbed versions of my videos. If you dubbed them, email me and I might add it as an official audio track.

Intro - 0:00 - 0:28
Video - 0:28 - 24:39
Outro - 24:39 - 24:48

This video is a horror short film, it uses

Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time.

Tyler Perry’s Why Did I Get Married Again? | Official Teaser | Netflix

movie_trailers.description: Movie trailers are dominating the trending list, with 4 out of 9 videos being official movie or series teasers.
movie_trailers.opportunity: Capitalize on the interest in upcoming films by creating complementary content such as reaction videos, deep dive analyses, and prediction videos.

gaming.description: Gaming content, including gameplay strategies and trailers for new releases, constitutes a significant portion of the trending list.
gaming.opportunity: Expand content by incorporating walkthrough guides, game reviews, and live streaming sessions to engage with the audience.

mystery/horror.description: Content featuring mysterious or horror elements, such as 'Something Won't Let You Leave...', is gaining traction.
mystery/horror.opportunity: Create story-driven content or ARGs (Alternate Reality Games) to leverage audience interest in mystery and horror genres.

diverse_content.observation: Creators are producing a wide range of content, from trailers to gaming and mystery videos.
diverse_content.strategy: Encourage creators to explore different types of content to test audience preferences and engagement levels.

brand_power.observation: Established brands like Warner Bros. and TOHO have a strong presence, indicating the power of brand recognition in driving views.
brand_power.strategy: Collaborate with popular brands for cross-promotions or sponsor content to increase visibility and leverage brand audiences.

collaborations.insight: There is an opportunity for cross-industry collaborations, especially between gaming and movie industries, to create engaging content that appeals to both audiences.
collaborations.action: Facilitate partnerships between game developers and filmmakers to produce exclusive content, such as behind-the-scenes looks or in-game movie tie-ins.

user-generated content.insight: User-generated content, particularly around popular games and series, can drive significant engagement.
user-generated content.action: Launch contests or challenges that encourage viewers to create their own content related to trending topics, with incentives for the best submissions.

emerging platforms.insight: With the rise of new platforms and formats (e.g., short-form videos), there is potential to repurpose trending content into these formats.
emerging platforms.action: Adapt longer videos into bite-sized, shareable clips for distribution on platforms like TikTok and Instagram Reels to reach a broader audience.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
